/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wno-error=array-bounds -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -Wextra-semi -fno-rtti -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -march=native -mtune=generic -Wno-deprecated -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/slot_point_test.dir/slot_point_test.cpp.o -o slot_point_test  ../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../lib/support/math/libocudu_support_math.a ../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a
